title: Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of the Diffie-Hellman key exchange between two parties, showing how a shared secret key is established over an insecure channel.
relationships: Calculates public key A = g^a mod p
Calculates public key B = g^b mod p
Exchanges public keys over insecure channel
Computes shared secret s = B^a mod p
Computes shared secret s = A^b mod p
